site_name.title: Site name
site_name.description: Human-readable site identifier from the site catalog.

country.title: Country
country.description: Country associated with the source website.

region.title: Region
region.description: Broader region associated with the source website.

language.title: Language
language.description: Language code or language family notation defined in the site catalog.

article_title.title: Article title
article_title.description: Headline extracted from the article page.

author.title: Author
author.description: Author or byline extracted from the article page.

article_body.title: Article body
article_body.description: Normalized text body extracted from the article page.

tags.title: Tags
tags.description: Tags or keywords associated with the article.

date_published.title: Published date
date_published.description: Article publication timestamp normalized to ISO 8601 UTC.

url_hash.title: URL hash
url_hash.description: MD5 hash of the canonical article URL used for deduplication.

main_image_url.title: Main image URL
main_image_url.description: Featured image URL extracted from the article metadata.

seo_description.title: SEO description
seo_description.description: SEO or social meta description extracted from the article page.

scraped_at.title: Scraped at
scraped_at.description: Timestamp when the scraper successfully extracted the article.

scraping_tool.title: Scraping tool
scraping_tool.description: Fetcher that successfully scraped the page.

execution_mode.title: Execution mode
execution_mode.description: Whether the run was current or historic.

category_url.title: Category URL
category_url.description: Category or listing URL that led to the article.

source_html_lang.title: Source HTML language
source_html_lang.description: The source document's HTML lang value, when available.
